raw_text:
WARNING [TC-G-003] interface.f90:5 <-> header.h:2  param[0] 'cproc'
  PLATFORM_FUNPTR_ALIGN: On Apple ARM64 (M1/M2/M3), C functions at 4-byte
  aligned addresses have bit 2 set in their pointer. Fortran C_F_PROCPOINTER
  clears bit 2. If the C function is not 8-byte aligned, the resulting
  Fortran procedure pointer points 4 bytes past the entry point.
  Immediate crash or wrong behaviour.
  Mitigation: compile C source with -falign-functions=8.
